title: Magical Norwegian Cocoa Brownies
description: Salty and crumbly Norwegian brownies featuring cocoa, air-fried to perfection in a cataplana vessel, perfect for those looking for an egg-free friendly dessert option.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Whisk together the flour, sugar, and cocoa powder in a large bowl.
Add the melted butter, flaky sea salt, and vanilla extract to the bowl and stir until combined.
Stir in the applesauce and chopped walnuts, if using.
Pour the batter into a cataplana vessel, greased with cooking spray.
Air-fry the brownies for 15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted comes out with a few moist crumbs.
Remove the brownies from the air fryer and let cool completely in the cataplana vessel.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 3 days.
